redirects.title: Manage Redirects
redirects.description: Manage HTTP redirects for your domains

zone_selection.title: Select Zone
zone_selection.description: Choose a DNS zone to manage its redirects
zone_selection.mock_data_description: DNS Layer API is not configured. Showing mock data for development.

zone_not_found.title: Zone Not Found
zone_not_found.description: The zone "{zoneId}" does not exist or you don't have access to it.

list.title: Redirects for {zoneName}
list.empty_description: Create your first redirect to get started.

form.host_help: Empty or {'@'} = apex ({zoneName}). Enter 'www' for subdomain.
form.source_path_help: Empty or '/' = root. Otherwise enter path starting with /
form.source_path_help_simple: Exact path to match. Must start with /
form.source_path_help_wildcard: Path with wildcard. Use * to match any content. Example: /products/* matches /products/anything
form.source_path_help_regex: Regular expression for path. Must start with ^ and end with $. Use groups ( ) for capture. Example: ^/blog/(.+)$
form.destination_url_help: The full URL to redirect to
form.destination_url_help_simple: Full URL to redirect to. Must be a valid URL.
form.destination_url_help_wildcard: Destination URL. Use * to preserve matched content. Example: https://example.com/shop/* where * is replaced with matched value.
form.destination_url_help_regex: Destination URL with regex group references. Use $1, $2, etc. to reference groups. Example: https://example.com/articles/$1
form.status_code_help: Select the HTTP status code for the redirect.
form.status_code_help_301: Use 301 for permanent redirects (e.g., domain move). Search engines update their indexes.
form.status_code_help_302: Use 302 for temporary redirects (e.g., maintenance). Search engines keep original URL.
form.status_code_help_307: Use 307 for temporary redirects that preserve HTTP method (GET/POST). Useful for forms.
form.status_code_help_308: Use 308 for permanent redirects that preserve HTTP method (GET/POST). Similar to 301 but stricter.
form.preset_domain_move_description: Creates two redirects: apex and www → new domain

validation.host_invalid: Invalid host. Enter {'@'} for apex, a subdomain label (e.g. 'www'), or a full hostname within the zone.

confirm.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this redirect? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_message_with_source: Are you sure you want to delete the redirect for "{source}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.bulk_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {count} redirects? This action cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Redirects
import.description: Upload a CSV or TXT file to bulk import redirects.
import.format_csv: Columns: sourcePath (source path), destinationUrl (destination URL), redirectType (simple/wildcard/regex), statusCode (301/302/307/308), isActive (true/false). First row can be headers.
import.format_txt: Space-separated: source path destination URL type status code (optional). Example: /old-page https://example.com/new-page simple 301
import.skip_duplicates: Skip existing redirects with same source path

export.title: Export Redirects
export.description: Download your redirects in CSV or TXT format.

network.title: Connection Error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
network.save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
network.load_failed: Failed to load. Please try again.
network.delete_failed: Failed to delete. Please try again.

server.title: Server Error
server.message: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.

validation.title: Validation Error
validation.message: Please check your input and try again.

generic.title: Error
generic.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

config.title: Configuration
config.traefik_path_help: Path to the Traefik dynamic configuration directory

dns_conflict.title: DNS conflict detected
dns_conflict.description: For redirects to work, the DNS record "{recordName}" must point to the redirects service. If you continue, existing records will be replaced.
dns_conflict.warning: This may impact traffic and other services using the same DNS name. Review the changes carefully before continuing.
dns_conflict.ack: I understand that existing DNS records may be replaced and that this can impact traffic.
